title: aspidium marginale
intro: Aspidium marginale, also known as the Chain Fern, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Dryopteridaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic properties. The health benefits of Aspidium marginale include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and treat various gastrointestinal issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
